titleStmt.title: SII 19.376: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao, Dines Chandra Sircar and G.S. Gai
No. 376. (A.R. No. 433 of 1918.) ON THE SAME WALL.

summary.p: The inscription is incomplete. It records an endowment of six pieces of land measuring one (vēli), 7 mā and 1 kāṇi in all, after purchasing the same from some residents of Kaḍalvāyil, and 1 mā and 1/2 kāṇi of his own land together with a house to the temple of Veḷḷaḍai-Āṇḍār at Tirukkurugāvūr in Tiruvāli-nāḍu by the (officer) Śembaṉ Aruḷaṉ Uttamanidhi alias Uttamaśōḻa-Mūvēndavēḷār. This is evidently an inscription of Uttama-Chōḷa.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . kopparakesaripanmaṟkki yāṇṭu patiñcāvatu deyam kaṭalvāyil bhūmiyuṭaiya pāratāyan Īśvaraṉ brāhmaṇi nila pātiriyum Āttiraiyaṉ devan ṉilakaṇṭaṉ brāhmaṇi nilaṉ koṟṟiyum kaṭalvāyil bhūmiyuṭaiya comattiyaṉ
ātittaṉ piṭāruṉum Ivvaṉaivariṭaiyum tiruvālināṭṭut tirukkurukāvūr veḷḷaṭai Āṇṭārkku cempan ṉaruḷaṉ ṉuttamanitiyāṉa Uttamacoḻa muventaveḷār Ivarkaḷiṭai vilaiyum kumum koṇṭa nilam kaṭalvāyilil melkoṭṭakattu nilat tukku kiḻpārkkellai locca
appiyāṭṭaṉukku Ūrkiḻān pāvaṉittan nāraṇan kan=tan tamma tukku meṟkum tenpārkkellai Uḷcciṟuvāykkālukku vaṭakkum melpārkkellai Ellai vāykkālukku kiḻakkum vaṭapārkkellai kovintavāykkālukku teṟkkum Ivicaitta perunāṉkellaiyilum Akappaṭṭa nilamarai
yum Itu Allatu Araimāvukku kiḻpārkkellai kāppiyan kāḷi kaḻiyanum tampimārun ṉilattukku meṟkum teṉpārkkellai cāttan nārāyaṇaṉ tiruvaṭikaḷ nilattukku vaṭakkum melpārkkellai tirumeṟṟaḷitevar nilattukku kiḻakkum vaṭapārk kellai
kkālukkum tirumeṟṟaḷitevar nilattukku teṟkum Ivicaitta perunāṉkellaiyi lumakappaṭṭa nilamaraimāvum kiḻūr muṉṟumāvukku kiḻpārkkellai Ūrkkiḻān pāvaṉittan kāṭampālai nilattukku meṟkum teṉpārkkellai kunṟappoḻanvāykkālukku vaṭakkum melpārkkellai mocinākaṉ vāy
pārkkellai Ūrkkiḻān pāvaṉittan kāṭan kecuvan ṉilattukku teṟkum Ivicaitta perunāṉkellaiyuḷakappaṭṭa nilam muṉṟumāvum koṭṭakattu Iraṇṭu mākkāṇikku kiḻpārkkellai kāśyapan ceruvan ṉampaṉ nilattukku meṟkum tenpārkkellai Irumpilivāykkālukku vaṭakkum melpārkkellai Ūrkiḻān
vaṭapārkkellai Ūrkiḻān pāvanittaṉ tavaraṉ centaṉ nilattukku teṟkum Ivicaitta perunāṉkellaiyu makappaṭṭa nilam Iraṇṭu mākkāṇiyum Iñce Araikkālukku kiḻpārkkellai Ūrkiḻān pāvanittaṉ nārāyaṇan Irāmatevan nilattukku meṟkum tenpārkkellai Irātitaran ṉārāyaṇan kumaraṉ nilattukku vaṭakkum mel
tukku kiḻakkum vaṭapārkkellai Ūrkiḻān pāvanittan kuṇatiranāraṇan nilattukku teṟkum Ivicaitta perunāṉkellaiyilumakappaṭṭa nilamaraikkālum Ituvallatu Oru māvukku kiḻpārkkellai pālāciriyan tattan cantiracekaraṉ nilattukku meṟkum teṉpārkkellai pāvanittan kāṭampālai nilattukku vaṭakkum melpārkkel
kiḻakkum vaṭapārkkellai Irumpilivāykkālukku teṟkum Ivicaitta perunāṉkellai yilumakappaṭṭa nilam Orumāvum Āka nilam Oṉṟe Eḻumākkāṇi Illa maṉaikku kiḻpārk kellai pāvanittanvaikuntaṉum tampimārum nilattukku meṟku teṉpārkkellai pāvanittan kāṭan kecuvan nilattukku vaṭakkum mel
nteva nilattukku kiḻakkum vaṭapārkkellai mokiliyan niṉṟān vaṭukan nilattukku teṟkum Ivvicaitta perunāṉkellaiyum Akappaṭṭa Immaṉaiyum śrīpaḷuvanmahādevi caturvvetimaṅkalattu karu kāvatikku meṟkum mulaparuṭaivāykkālukku teṟkum
ṭainta mutal caturam kayvantavāṟṟāl Āttakūr Ātitta piṭārakramavittanuḷḷiṭṭa caturattārkku paṭṭa munṟu māvil vaṭakkaṭaiya nān naṭaittuṭaittu muṭaiyenāta Oru māvaraik kāṇiyumThe inscription stops here.
Digital edition of SII 19.376 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
